title: Translation Namespace
description: Localized UI strings grouped by namespace, used to generate flat locale files

namespace.title: Namespace
namespace.description: Grouping key used as dot-prefix in locale files (e.g. 'card', 'nav', 'form')

strings.title: Translations
strings.description: Key-value pairs for this namespace. Keys become dot-suffixed entries in locale files (e.g. 'add' becomes 'card.add')
